title: The Ancient Shandia Village
description: Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Enel, Calgara, Mont Blanc Noland, Musse, Shandia villager. Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.

dialogue.speaker: Musse
dialogue.text: Admiral... Why you gotta be like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Shandia villager
dialogue.text: They're shouting decide! Just what's going on...?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Kill him to calm God's fury!

dialogue.speaker: Musse
dialogue.text: You have no right to talk here!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Atone your sins to the gods!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Take that knife and end your life.

summary: Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.
